news.headline: OpenSearchCon North America 2026 to Showcase Five Years of Innovation Powering Enterprise Search, Observability and Analytics
news.summary: The OpenSearch Software Foundation, the neutral home for the OpenSearch Project, today announced the schedule for OpenSearchCon North America (NA) 2026, which takes place in San Jose, California from September 22-24. The event will bring together developers, architects, and enterprise leaders to explore how OpenSearch is powering the next generation of AI, search, observability and analytics at enterprise scale.

news.headline: These high-flying tech stocks are down 60% — here's how to shop the sell-off: One Big Investment Idea
news.summary: A new generation of futuristic, high-flying tech stocks has been cut down by roughly 60% from its highs. That is enough damage to start looking for opportunity — but not enough to make every stock a bargain.

news.headline: Which stocks are most active on Thursday?
news.summary: Let's dive into the action on the US markets on Thursday. Here are the most active stocks that are driving the market today.

news.headline: Lilly to file for next-gen obesity drug approval in early 2027
news.summary: Investing.com -- Eli Lilly announced Thursday it will file for approval of its next-generation obesity drug retatrutide in the first quarter of 2027, pushing back from an earlier timeline that targeted this year. The pharmaceutical company said it needs additional time to collect and verify manufacturing and quality-control data required by regulators.

news.headline: How Novo Nordisk’s GLP-1 Advertising Lawsuit Against Eli Lilly (LLY) Has Changed Its Investment Story
news.summary: In recent days, Novo Nordisk filed a federal lawsuit against Eli Lilly, alleging that Lilly’s nationwide advertising for obesity and diabetes drugs like Zepbound and Mounjaro used outdated clinical data and unfair dose comparisons to claim superiority over Novo’s Wegovy and Ozempic. The case raises legal and regulatory questions around drug marketing practices in the high-stakes GLP-1 market, where only a few companies currently compete at scale. Beyond the courtroom, this dispute highlights...

news.headline: Another win for Lilly’s triple-g agonist in two more Phase III trials
news.summary: If approved, Lilly’s triple-g agonist would become the company’s fifth glucagon-based drug to be marketed.

news.headline: Is Palo Alto (PANW) a Buy as Wall Street Analysts Look Optimistic?
news.summary: The average brokerage recommendation (ABR) for Palo Alto (PANW) is equivalent to a Buy. The overly optimistic recommendations of Wall Street analysts make the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric questionable. So, is it worth buying the stock?

news.headline: Palo Alto Networks (PANW) Is Buying Embrace To Expand Observability Into User Experience
news.summary: Palo Alto Networks announced plans to acquire Embrace, a provider of Digital Experience Monitoring tools. The deal is intended to add Real User Monitoring and Synthetic monitoring capabilities to its Observability platform. This move is aimed at deepening the company's reach into application performance and end user experience management. Palo Alto Networks, ticker NasdaqGS:PANW, is extending beyond core security into broader Observability with the planned Embrace acquisition. The stock...

news.headline: AI Models Went Rogue, and These Stocks Are Ready for the Fight
news.summary: Palo Alto Networks, CrowdStrike and Okta have benefited from cybersecurity threats posed by AI, and are trading at high multiples.

news.headline: Prediction: 1 Reason Palantir Could Keep Beating the Market
news.summary: Palantir has been crushed year to date while the S&P 500 climbs, yet a single performance metric shared by only three other companies in the world suggests the selloff may be creating a rare opportunity.

news.headline: Why Is CrowdStrike Stock Falling on Thursday?
news.summary: CrowdStrike Holdings Inc (NASDAQ: CRWD) stock drops on Thursday due to tech sector pressure, profit-taking, and lingering legal liability concerns.

news.summary: The stars are aligning for a special member of the "Magnificent Seven" to become the next blockbuster stock split.

news.headline: Tesla Hits 11-Month Low: 'Patience Required,' Says Analyst
news.summary: Tesla analysts lower their price targets after Q2 results, but see long-term growth getting more clear.
